title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IDFC First Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IDFC First Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
